description: Mock result that simulates vector search over embedded news chunks.
embedding_model_hint: text-embedding-3-small 또는 유사 임베딩 모델을 사용했다고 가정
retrieval_query_template: SELECT title, chunk_text, similarity_score FROM news_chunks ORDER BY embedding <=> :query_embedding LIMIT 3;

chunks.title: NVIDIA expands AI accelerator roadmap
chunks.chunk_text: NVIDIA is assumed to be strengthening its AI accelerator roadmap while demand from hyperscalers remains strong. This is mock news content for RAG demonstration.

chunks.title: TSMC capacity planning remains tied to AI chip demand
chunks.chunk_text: TSMC is assumed to be adjusting advanced-node capacity planning in response to demand from AI chip customers. This is mock news content for RAG demonstration.

chunks.title: Samsung Electronics highlights HBM investment direction
chunks.chunk_text: Samsung Electronics is assumed to be emphasizing HBM-related investment and memory competitiveness. This is mock news content for RAG demonstration.

chunks.title: Apple focuses on on-device AI features
chunks.chunk_text: Apple is assumed to be expanding on-device AI features across devices. This is mock news content for RAG demonstration.
